title: Diorite's Better Guardians
description: Makes Elder Guardians an actual boss fight
body:
## Changes:
### Guardians:
- Charge attack
### Elder Guardians
- Instant Mining Fatigue (similar to bedrock edition)
- Better Loot Table (Enchanted books, chance for Trident and Heart of the sea)
- Charge attack
- Clone attack
- Summons minions
- Ink attack (charges up then inflicts blindness to close entities)
- Roar attack (Destroys nearby blocks such as doors, has a higher chance of happening if the player is in a door)
